text.*:
Death's Store
Release18 August 2014 (Update)
MembersYes
Shop typeMinigames
LocationDeath's office
OwnerDeath
[view] • [talk]

Death's Store is a reward shop for the Soul Reaper activity, run by Death in his office.

Contents

  • 1 Points
  • 2 Stock
    • 2.1 Items
    • 2.2 Unlocks
    • 2.3 Rewards
    • 2.4 Historical
  • 3 Achievements
  • 4 Update history
  • 5 Trivia

Points

[edit | edit source]

Purchases from the store require either Reaper points or Slayer points.

Each Reaper point is worth 127,821 coins, based on the GE guide price of an incomplete hydrix (or 69,936 coins based on death notes). Since some rewards can be purchased with either Reaper points or Slayer points, one of those two options will usually be cheaper because of the different opportunity costs. The value of a Slayer point (based on the value of Slayer Dart runes) is 1,364 coins. So, for example, the bonfire upgrade effectively costs 31,955,178 coins if purchased with Reaper points, and only 3,410,714 coins if purchased with Slayer points.

Stock

[edit | edit source]

All items are single use and will be consumed when used.

Unlocks

[edit | edit source]

The following effects are permanent.

ItemPrice
sold at		In-game descriptionNeeded for
Death Effect
Book of Death
(Feature unlock) 		500Unlock the ability to create a Book of Death.
Reaper's choice 250Random chance of being able to choose your assignment when receiving a new one.[s 1]
Rainbow loot beam
(Reaper) 		75Unlock the option to have rainbow loot beams.
Rainbow loot beam
(Slayer) 		750Unlock the option to have rainbow loot beams.
Grave loot beam
(Reaper) 		75Unlock the option to have grave loot beams.
Grave loot beam
(Slayer) 		750Unlock the option to have grave loot beams.
Bonfire booster
(Reaper) 		250Permanently increase the duration of bonfire health boosts by 25%.
Bonfire booster
(Slayer) 		2,500Permanently increase the duration of bonfire health boosts by 25%.
Instance cost 250Permanently reduce the cost of boss instancing by 25%.
Reaper Scroll 250Permanently increases the Slayer XP received from reaper tasks by 50%.
Death's Support 250Permanently increases the amount healed from sign and portent of life and death by 100%.[s 2]
Ring of death (o)
(Feature unlock) 		150Death can now increase the charge capacity of your Ring of Death by 400%.[s 3]
  1. ^ 10% chance. Re-rolled assignments also have this chance. Having War's Blessing 1, 2 or 3 increases this chance to 15%, 25% and 50% respectively. War's Blessing 4 guarantees the selection.
  2. ^ Doubles the amount healed from signs and portents of life, as well as signs and portents of death from 25% to 50% and 15% to 30% respectively. This also applies to the Defence cape perk.
  3. ^ Overcharging a ring of death costs 5 onyxes and 25 black stone hearts.

Rewards

[edit | edit source]

The boss counters can be viewed in the Beasts tab of the Adventures interface. All boss kills are counted, regardless of whether they were assigned by Death.

Achievements

[edit | edit source]
  • Death Effect ( 75) – Unlock all permanent effects from Death's Store. (X/8)

Update history

[edit | edit source]
This information has been compiled as part of the update history project. Some updates may not be included – see here for how to help out!
  • patch 13 April 2026 (Update):
    • Following the removal of auras, Death no longer sells aura refresh.
  • patch 23 March 2026 (Update):
    • Removed the 'Additional task' reward from Death's Store as the associated functionality was removed with the DailyScape Improvements project.
    • The description of the Death's Deal reward in Death's store now fits correctly.
  • patch 22 April 2024 (Update):
    • Death's Store now requires a Bank Pin in order to access it.
  • patch 5 August 2019 (Update):
    • The ring of death upgrade can once again be purchased from Death.
  • patch 1 April 2019 (Update):
    • Death's store now offers an overcharge option for the Ring of Death. Unlocking the option costs 150 reaper points, then rings may be overcharged in Death's dialogue at a cost of 5 cut onyx and 25 black stone hearts.
  • patch 14 August 2017 (Update):
    • A missing word has been added in dialogue when buying Death's deal as a reaper reward.
  • patch 13 February 2017 (Update):
    • Purchased unlocks from Death's Store now correctly appear as unlocked on the interface.
  • update 18 August 2014 (Update):
    • Added to game.

Trivia

[edit | edit source]
  • It's possible that "Death's Store" is a pun on the idiom "at Death's door"
